description.en: Retrieve detailed information about a specific GitHub issue including comments, labels, and assignees.
description.de: Ruft detaillierte Informationen über ein bestimmtes GitHub-Issue ab, einschließlich Kommentaren, Labels und Zugewiesenen.
description.es: Retrieve detailed information about a specific GitHub issue including comments, labels, and assignees.
description.fr: Retrieve detailed information about a specific GitHub issue including comments, labels, and assignees.
description.ro: Retrieve detailed information about a specific GitHub issue including comments, labels, and assignees.
description.it: Retrieve detailed information about a specific GitHub issue including comments, labels, and assignees.

vars.API_KEY: env:GITHUB_TOKEN|Get your personal access token from https://github.com/settings/tokens

description.en: The owner of the repository (username or organization).
description.es: El propietario del repositorio (nombre de usuario u organización).
description.fr: Le propriétaire du référentiel (nom d'utilisateur ou organisation).
description.ro: Proprietarul depozitului (nume de utilizator sau organizație).
description.it: Il proprietario del repository (nome utente o organizzazione).
